reasoning: Growth should start with direct seller outreach and proof assets; SEO and paid ads are premature until conversion from paid SKU packs is known.
known: Cross-border sellers are reachable through seller communities and direct operator outreach.
Paid alternatives provide SEO vocabulary and pricing anchors.
No landing page or conversion data exists yet.
assumed: Before/after demos will drive more intent than feature copy.
Seller groups will tolerate value-first posts with image rule checklists.
Search demand exists around product image editing and Amazon listing image optimization.
toValidate: Which channel yields the first 10 qualified sellers fastest?
Which demo category converts best: home goods, beauty, electronics, apparel, or food?
Whether China sellers prefer WeChat consultative sales instead of a web landing page.
Whether Amazon-specific copy outperforms broad ecommerce copy.
concerns: Broad platform positioning will dilute message clarity.
AI-generated demo images may be distrusted unless product fidelity is shown clearly.
Communities may view promotional image services as spam without useful checklists.
nextSteps: Create 3 before/after demo packs from non-sensitive sample products.
Write one Amazon main-image checklist lead magnet.
DM 10 sellers with a specific offer: one SKU pack reviewed against Amazon rules.
Track every outreach with UTM or spreadsheet source tags.

marketRouting.reason: First wedge is cross-border Amazon; China seller channels remain a secondary validation track.

titles: Amazon Product Image Pack From One Raw Photo
metaDescriptions: Generate and review Amazon-ready product image sets from one raw product photo.

channels.name: direct seller outreach
channels.hypothesis: Specific SKU image audit offers will outperform generic AI-image pitches.
channels.measurement: qualified calls and paid SKU packs

channels.name: seller communities
channels.hypothesis: A useful image compliance checklist can start conversations without looking like spam.

channels.name: SEO
channels.hypothesis: Long-tail compliance queries can generate later inbound demand.
channels.measurement: Search Console impressions and booked calls

competitors.name: Pixc
competitors.positioning: Done-for-you ecommerce photo editing for online sellers.
competitors.positioningZh: 面向线上卖家的电商商品图代修服务。
competitors.pricing: Use as pricing anchor only; verify current public pricing before quoting.
competitors.pricingZh: 只作为定价锚点；正式报价前需要核对最新公开价格。
competitors.weakness: Broad editing service; weaker Amazon-specific compliance workflow and rejection-repair positioning.
competitors.weaknessZh: 定位偏泛修图；Amazon 合规流程和图片被拒修复切入不够尖。

competitors.name: Cheeppy
competitors.positioning: Low-friction product image cleanup and editing alternative.
competitors.positioningZh: 低门槛商品图清理和处理替代方案。
competitors.pricing: Treat as a low-cost alternative anchor; verify current plan details before using.
competitors.pricingZh: 可作为低成本替代方案锚点；使用前核对最新套餐。
competitors.weakness: Weak compliance proof and limited differentiated Amazon seller workflow in current report evidence.
competitors.weaknessZh: 当前证据里合规证明弱，也缺少明显 Amazon 卖家工作流差异。

competitors.name: ProductMagic AI
competitors.positioning: AI-generated product photos and marketing visuals.
competitors.positioningZh: AI 生成商品图和营销视觉。
competitors.pricing: Use as AI-subscription benchmark; verify latest plan before quoting.
competitors.pricingZh: 可作为 AI 订阅工具基准；报价前核对最新套餐。
competitors.weakness: Generic AI-photo positioning can miss platform-rule review, fidelity checks, and seller trust.
competitors.weaknessZh: 通用 AI 商品图容易缺少平台规则审核、产品保真和卖家信任证明。

competitors.name: Prodshot AI
competitors.positioning: AI product photography for ecommerce catalog and ad images.
competitors.positioningZh: 面向电商目录和广告图的 AI 商品摄影。
competitors.pricing: Use as AI-photo packaging benchmark; verify current offer before quoting.
competitors.pricingZh: 可作为 AI 商品图包装基准；报价前核对当前方案。
competitors.weakness: Less focused on Amazon main-image rules, seller rejection recovery, and human-reviewed delivery.
competitors.weaknessZh: 不够聚焦 Amazon 主图规则、卖家图片被拒修复和人工审核交付。
notCopyableZh: 只有视觉新鲜感但缺少合规证明

differentiationMatrix.current: Amazon-ready SKU image pack from one raw product photo, with human rule review.
differentiationMatrix.currentZh: 用一张原图交付 Amazon 可用的 SKU 图片包，并保留人工规则审核。
differentiationMatrix.competitorPattern: Competitors cluster around broad ecommerce editing or generic AI product photos.
differentiationMatrix.competitorPatternZh: 竞品多集中在泛电商修图或通用 AI 商品图。
differentiationMatrix.differ: Lead with compliance, rejection repair, and marketplace-readiness instead of generic image quality.
differentiationMatrix.differZh: 主打合规、图片被拒修复和平台可上架，而不是泛泛的画质优化。

differentiationMatrix.current: Before/after pack plus compliance notes and one revision boundary.
differentiationMatrix.currentZh: 前后对照图片包，加合规说明和一次修改边界。
differentiationMatrix.competitorPattern: Competitors often show galleries, but do not always explain platform-rule decisions.
differentiationMatrix.competitorPatternZh: 竞品常展示图库，但不一定解释平台规则判断。
differentiationMatrix.differ: Show rule checklist, rejected-image repair examples, and human review ownership.
differentiationMatrix.differZh: 展示规则清单、图片被拒修复案例和人工审核责任边界。

differentiationMatrix.current: Fixed-scope paid SKU pack before subscription SaaS.
differentiationMatrix.currentZh: 先卖固定范围付费 SKU 图片包，再考虑订阅 SaaS。
differentiationMatrix.competitorPattern: Competitors use broad per-image, credit, or subscription packaging.
differentiationMatrix.competitorPatternZh: 竞品常用按图、点数或订阅包装。
differentiationMatrix.differ: Price by seller outcome: one listing-ready SKU pack with compliance notes.
differentiationMatrix.differZh: 按卖家结果定价：一套可上架 SKU 图片包加合规说明。

differentiationMatrix.current: Capture compliance and rejection-repair queries before broad AI-photo terms.
differentiationMatrix.currentZh: 先抢合规和图片被拒修复词，再做泛 AI 商品图词。
differentiationMatrix.competitorPattern: Competitors are easier to find on broad product photo and editing terms.
differentiationMatrix.competitorPatternZh: 竞品更容易覆盖泛商品图和修图词。
differentiationMatrix.differ: Build pages around Amazon main-image requirements, white-background service, and rejected listing fixes.
differentiationMatrix.differZh: 围绕 Amazon 主图要求、白底服务和 listing 图片被拒修复建页。

differentiationMatrix.current: Direct seller outreach and checklist-led community posts before traffic scaling.
differentiationMatrix.currentZh: 先做直接卖家触达和清单型社区帖，再放大流量。
differentiationMatrix.competitorPattern: Competitors may rely on generic SEO pages, visual galleries, or paid acquisition.
differentiationMatrix.competitorPatternZh: 竞品可能依赖泛 SEO 页面、视觉图库或付费获客。
differentiationMatrix.differ: Use each long-tail page as an outreach artifact, not only as passive SEO.
differentiationMatrix.differZh: 把每个长尾词页面当作触达材料，而不仅是被动 SEO。

longTailKeywords.validationUse: Use as a lead magnet in seller communities and DMs.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 作为卖家社区和私信触达里的引导资料。

longTailKeywords.query: Amazon main image white background service
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Offer one SKU pack and measure paid or near-paid replies.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 提出一个 SKU 图片包报价，并衡量付费或接近付费回复。

longTailKeywords.queryZh: Amazon listing 图片被拒修复
longTailKeywords.landingPageZh: Amazon listing 图片被拒修复页
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Ask sellers to share the rejection reason and raw image.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 请求卖家提供被拒原因和原始图片。

longTailKeywords.landingPageZh: Amazon 商品图合规审计页
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Quote a fixed manual audit before building automation.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 先给固定范围人工审计报价，再考虑自动化。

longTailKeywords.queryZh: 电商平台图片合规清单
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Test whether non-Amazon sellers ask for the same service.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 测试非 Amazon 卖家是否也会索要相同服务。

longTailKeywords.query: ecommerce product photo editing service for Amazon
longTailKeywords.queryZh: Amazon 电商商品图修图服务
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Compare paid service wording against AI-first wording.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 对比服务型文案和 AI 优先文案的转化差异。

longTailKeywords.query: AI product photos for Amazon sellers
longTailKeywords.queryZh: Amazon 卖家的 AI 商品图
longTailKeywords.landingPageZh: Amazon 卖家 AI 商品图页
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Use only after showing human review and fidelity proof.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 必须搭配人工审核和产品保真证明使用。

longTailKeywords.landingPageZh: Amazon 商品图优化服务页
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Measure booked calls from direct outreach plus organic impressions.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 衡量直接触达和自然展现带来的预约通话。

longTailKeywords.query: product image pack for Amazon listing
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Use as the core offer page in all seller DMs.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 作为所有卖家私信里的核心报价页。

longTailKeywords.query: Pixc alternative for Amazon product images
longTailKeywords.landingPageZh: Pixc 替代方案：Amazon 商品图
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Use only with factual, fair differentiation and no unsupported claims.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 只做事实型公平差异说明，不写无证据攻击。

longTailKeywords.query: AI product photo generator with compliance review
longTailKeywords.queryZh: 带合规审核的 AI 商品图生成器
longTailKeywords.landingPageZh: AI 商品图合规审核页
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Position human review as the reason to trust AI output.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 把人工审核作为信任 AI 输出的理由。

longTailKeywords.landingPageZh: 跨境卖家商品图服务页
longTailKeywords.validationUse: Test WeChat consultative sales against web landing-page interest.
longTailKeywords.validationUseZh: 测试微信咨询式销售和网页落地页的需求差异。

contentBacklog.assetZh: Amazon 主图被拒检查清单
keywordsZh: Amazon listing 图片被拒修复
contentBacklog.successMetric: 3 qualified seller replies or one paid audit request.
contentBacklog.successMetricZh: 3 个有效卖家回复，或 1 个付费审计请求。

contentBacklog.asset: Amazon product image pack offer page
contentBacklog.assetZh: Amazon 商品图片包报价页
keywords: product image pack for Amazon listing
contentBacklog.successMetric: One buyer accepts or negotiates a SKU-pack price.
contentBacklog.successMetricZh: 1 位买家接受或议价 SKU 图片包价格。

keywords: Pixc alternative for Amazon product images
contentBacklog.successMetric: Comparison page produces fair objections or booked calls.
contentBacklog.successMetricZh: 对比页带来真实异议或预约通话。

serpGapNotes.note: Current keyword and competitor data is directional; no live SERP, volume, CPC, or ranking data has been captured yet.
serpGapNotes.noteZh: 当前关键词和竞品数据是方向性判断；还没有实时 SERP、搜索量、CPC 或排名数据。
serpGapNotes.nextCheck: After publishing, connect Search Console and compare query-page impressions weekly.
serpGapNotes.nextCheckZh: 发布后接入 Search Console，每周对比查询词和页面展现。

serpGapNotes.note: Comparison pages must stay factual and proof-led; avoid unsupported claims about competitor quality or pricing.
serpGapNotes.noteZh: 竞品对比页必须保持事实和证据导向；避免对竞品质量或价格做无证据判断。
serpGapNotes.nextCheck: Review every competitor claim before publishing.
serpGapNotes.nextCheckZh: 发布前复核每一条竞品相关表述。

handoffSummary.summary: Operate the first week as a sales/service experiment; success means paid packs and acceptable revision economics, not traffic volume.
